message:

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "gitea-2529-wildcard-protected-branch",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "gitea: Wildcard Protected Branch",
+    "description": "Wildcard Protected Branch. Requested by 43+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current gitea setup",
+        "description": "Verify your gitea version and configuration:\n```bash\ngitea --version\n```\nThis feature requires a working gitea installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review gitea configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant gitea configuration:\nWith the last version, you could only protect branches that exists. But I think it should also be possible to protect branches given as wildcard (similar to GitLab),\ne.g.: `pu/*`, `release/*`, `feature/*`"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Wildcard Protected Branch",
+        "description": "Fix #2922.\nReplaces #7093.\n\nI have tried to make this work if we get wildcard protected branches as well.  maybe you want to have a look.\n\nThe new API endpoints:\n```\nGET /repos/{owner}/{repo}/branch_protections   (Get list)\nPOST /repos/{owner}/{repo}/branch_protections  (Create new)\nGET /repos/{owner}/{repo}/branch_protections/{branch} (Get a specific)\nPATCH /repos/{owner}/{repo}/branch_protections/{branch} (Edit)\nDELETE /repos/{owner}/{repo}/branch_protections/{branch}\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"Wildcard Protected Branch\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Fix #2922.\nReplaces #7093.\n\nI have tried to make this work if we get wildcard protected branches as well.  maybe you want to have a look.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "GET /repos/{owner}/{repo}/branch_protections   (Get list)\nPOST ​/repos​/{owner}​/{repo}​/branch_protections  (Create new)\nGET ​/repos​/{owner}​/{repo}​/branch_protections​/{branch} (Get a specific))\nPATCH ​/repos​/{owner}​/{repo}​/branch_protections​/{branch} (Edit)\nDELETE ​/repos​/{owner}​/{repo}​/branch_protections​/{branch}",
+        "GET ​/repos​/{owner}​/{repo}​/branches​/{branch}"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "gitea",
+      "community",
+      "git-hosting",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "gitea"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "community",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/go-gitea/gitea/issues/2529",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/go-gitea/gitea",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/go-gitea/gitea/pull/9311"
+    },
+    "reactions": 43,
+    "comments": 16,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "docker",
+      "git"
+    ],

+  },
